purpose: Define capability stages and measurable growth for handoff context judgment.
load_condition: Load when coaching, improvement, or practice measurement is requested.

stages.name: Chronological Summarizer
stages.description: Produces a chronological summary of what happened. Loses decisions, constraints, and unresolved questions. No forward-looking content. Includes derivable details (code, commit messages).
indicators: Includes implementation details that are in the code

stages.name: Structured Hander-Offer
stages.description: Produces a structured handoff with goal, decisions, constraints, unresolved questions, risks, and next steps. Removes noise. Preserves judgment layer. Self-contained.

stages.name: Context Strategist
stages.description: Tailors handoff content to the next agent's needs and access level. Calibrates signal-to-noise ratio for the situation. Anticipates what the next agent will need to know that isn't obvious. Manages multi-session context continuity.
indicators: Handoff calibrated to next agent's access and needs
Proactively identifies what the next agent will struggle with
Multi-session context managed across multiple handoffs
Signal-to-noise ratio optimized for the situation

evolution_layers.name: From summarizer to structured hander-offer
evolution_layers.capability: Produce structured handoffs that preserve judgment and enable continuity

evolution_layers.name: From structured to strategist
evolution_layers.capability: Tailor handoffs to the situation and manage multi-session continuity

measurement.how: Count the number of decisions made during a session that are documented in the handoff with rationale, divided by total decisions made.
Count the number of handoff statements that contain irreplaceable information vs. derivable information.
Count the number of sessions where the next agent could continue without re-discovering context, divided by total handoffs.
